metadata_json.revision_goal: Deliverable artifact access_policy_simulation.csv meets the artifact-contract and arithmetic/logic checks: scoring formula and intermediate calculations are present and recompute to the computed_risk_score values (A=100, B=50, C=20). Deterministic artifact precheck passed and model-based grader verified consistency. Main improvement opportunities: (1) normalize CSV header names to the expected canonical fields for automated verifiers, and (2) embed or attach original evidence documents (scan outputs, admin assignment records, classification proofs) instead of only marking needs_review, to improve semantic validation and reviewer efficiency. Also clarify grader messaging to separate deterministic precheck scope from model-based arithmetic verification.
